content.en:
Ye Tian had enough time to practice here, so he was not in a hurry to go to other places.

He first condensed his own original copy body, and then let this copy body enter the silver light river.

Rumble!!!

The energy in the Silver Light River was absorbed by Ye Tian's body, quickly refining the Infinite Body.

With the help of the Silver Light River's energy, Ye Tian's Infinite Body was rising at a terrifying speed.

You must know that the progress of the Infinite Body is not just to increase the strength of the body, but to fundamentally increase the strength of the Infinite Body, and this is very difficult to do.

In these years, Ye Tian had also tried to cultivate the Infinite Body, but it was very difficult, so there was almost no progress.

But in this river of silver light, his progress is incredible.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's Infinite Body became stronger and stronger, but the energy of the Silver Light River was also being consumed, and it was not endless.

If it is endless, then how many Great Ancestors who have cultivated immeasurable bodies have to be cultivated!

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of realms have passed.

For Ye Tian, the first year of tens of thousands of realms was also a relatively long time.

And after such a long time, he had consumed almost one-third of the energy of the Silver Light River.

And this day.

Ye Tian's Infinite Body finally ushered in a breakthrough.

Rumble!!!!

The shackles of the Infinite Body were broken, and the strength of the body skyrocketed wildly, and in the blink of an eye, it was several times stronger than before.

"The body of the infinite is small!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

After reaching this level, it will be very difficult for the Infinite Body to progress further.

Ye Tian continued to cultivate, and found that the energy of the Silver Light River was of no use to him, and continuing to practice here was just a waste of energy.

So, he left the Silver Light River and went to another place in the Black Sacred Mountain.

......

In a time and space on the top of the Black Sacred Mountain, an incomparably majestic black giant tree stood here, and this black giant tree released black light to shine in all directions.

And Ye Tian got into here and came under the black giant tree.

"Immeasurable True Tree!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is the immeasurable true tree that the blood told him, this immeasurable true tree is a strange tree that the blood once found in a treasure land, and then he moved it to the Black Holy Mountain, and paid a certain price to grow and continue to grow.

The Immeasurable True Tree can speed up the practice and assist in the enlightenment of the Immeasurable Path.

For example, if you practice the immeasurable path of the perfect realm, you can comprehend the immeasurable path of the ultimate realm more quickly.

And Ye Tian is now only one step away from comprehending the immeasurable path of the extreme realm, if he is here to comprehend, he will soon be able to break the shackles and comprehend the immeasurable path to the extreme realm.

So, Ye Tian sat cross-legged under the immeasurable true tree and began to comprehend the immeasurable path.

"Such a powerful effect, even the Innocent Gold Mountain can't compare to this immeasurable true tree!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that he only needed a few hundred realms to raise the Infinite Dao to the extreme realm.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

In the blink of an eye, more than 800 realms have passed for the first year.

Airplanes!!!

The fluctuations of the Extreme Realm Immeasurable Dao spread out from Ye Tian's body.

At this moment, his immeasurable path had already broken through and reached the limit realm.

"Finally a breakthrough!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he took out the immeasurable Xuanbi to test his attack power

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian slammed into the immeasurable Xuanbi with all his strength, and a large area of light spread out.

Then, a number appeared.

“5200！"

This means that Ye Tian's attack power has reached 5200 immeasurable scales, and his previous attack power was only 3000 immeasurable scales.

Compared with the 5200 immeasurable scale and the 3000 immeasurable scale, it is not just a little bit higher, but a qualitative improvement, and the difference in combat effectiveness is too big!

In addition, the Infinite Dao Domain is far more than in the past, so the combat power has improved much more than in the past, and it is easy to crush the past self.

After the Infinite Dao was raised to the extreme realm, there was no way to continue to ascend.

If you want to continue to ascend to the realm of the Dao, you must comprehend the Immeasurable Extreme Dao!

The Immeasurable Path is that after the Immeasurable Path reaches its limit, it will become the Immeasurable Path after another transformation.

A trace of the Infinite Extreme Dao can crush the Infinite Dao of the Extreme Realm, but it is too difficult and too difficult to comprehend the Infinite Extreme Dao.

At least in the True Mountain Realm, there was not a single Great Ancestor who had comprehended the Immeasurable Extreme Dao, let alone those Supreme Nine Ancestors of the Silent Black Sea.

"Raccoon Blood may have comprehended the Immeasurable Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't think too much about it, just relying on this immeasurable true tree, there was no way to help him break the shackles and comprehend the immeasurable extreme path.

What's more, he hadn't even seen the Immeasurable Path, he had only learned a name, so he couldn't comprehend the Immeasurable Path in a short period of time.

"Let's first improve the immeasurable will!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His current immeasurable will is 178 scales, and it is more difficult for immeasurable will to reach this scale and improve the scale.

However, there are still a lot of resources in the Black Saint Mountain, perhaps in the eyes of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, this resource is nothing at all, it is only equivalent to ordinary resources.

But for Ye Tian, the resources here are still very good, enough to improve his strength a lot.

So in the following days, Ye Tian found a kind of resources that could help improve his immeasurable will or cultivation, and improve his immeasurable will and cultivation.

At the same time, Ye Tian also used the ability to fuse all things to synthesize a variety of precious resources, some of which were useful to himself, and some of which were useless and traded.

In this way, Ye Tian's immeasurable will became stronger and stronger, and his cultivation became higher and higher.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the extreme of the primary immeasurable life form, and the immeasurable will had also reached the level of 198 scales, and it was very difficult to continue to improve.

"Next, we have to hit the realm of middle-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

With Ye Tian's potential foundation, if he wanted to impact the Infinite Life Body Realm, he could easily break the shackles now.

However, he wants to make the perfect promotion!

The advantage of perfect promotion is that the potential is greater, and the increase in strength is greater, and the increase in immeasurable will and immeasurable body is also greater.

If there is no way to make a perfect promotion, it would be good to break through directly, but Ye Tian still has hope for a perfect promotion, so he naturally wants to pursue a perfect promotion.

The first requirement for perfect promotion is to practice an immeasurable body, whether it is a superior immeasurable body or a inferior immeasurable body, it is in line with the first requirement for perfect promotion.

The second requirement is that the Infinite Dao reaches the limit realm, and Ye Tian has now met this requirement.

The last requirement is to find an immeasurable origin qi, and you can use the immeasurable origin qi to achieve perfect promotion.
